notes: Most assertions pass in both configurations — topics (Serilog, MSIX, virtualization) are well-covered by base model knowledge
Skill adds value primarily in: explicit dependency direction rules (eval-0), desktop-specific migration patterns (backup rotation, version gap), and consistent .NET 10 + Generic Host wiring patterns
The only assertion failure (eval-0/without_skill/dependency direction) shows the skill adds structural clarity not present in baseline
with_skill answers are faster on average (50.9s vs 56.9s) — likely because the skill provides direct code templates rather than the model generating from scratch
Token overhead of skill (+1545 avg) reflects skill loading but produces more complete answers on architecture topics
